title: The Warden of Greyford
target: remove the Warden of Greyford — the petty tyrant who broke Marek's old company — from the watch-tower he holds with twenty pikemen

contributions.line: Imogen steps forward, her tone measured and calm, offering terms while subtly displaying her cult's insignia.
Veska stays back, eyes the door for guards or surprises, ready if violence becomes necessary.
Marek keeps his hand near his blade, listening intently and weighing the petty tyrant’s words, prepared for betrayal.

outcomeNarrative: The Warden, guarded and dismissive, agrees to surrender once Imogen’s calm diplomacy convinces him that resistance is futile, though the tension remains thick.
